description: The prior-authorization request as submitted to the payer (provider side). Notarize-only: it records WHAT was asked for and WHEN, so the provider has a signed 'this is what we submitted' artifact and the 72h-expedited / 7-day-standard CMS-0057-F decision clock has a tamper-evident start. AGLedger does not adjudicate it — the payer's Da Vinci PAS / X12 278 system does (see halcyon-pa-disposition-v1). Correlate every downstream record by claimId.

claimId.description: Business key correlating all records for this PA across the request -> disposition -> determination -> appeal chain.

memberRef.description: De-identified member reference (e.g. member/MRN-hash). Do NOT put PHI in the clear.

urgency.description: expedited = 72h decision clock; standard = 7-day. Drives the CMS-0057-F timeliness obligation the disposition is measured against.

clinicalDocRef.description: Optional reference to the DTR QuestionnaireResponse / clinical evidence packet supporting medical necessity.
